summary: Tested backend config API (GET/PUT/reset) via pytest (5/5 pass) and frontend CMS builder + /store storefront via Playwright. All primary features work: section pill navigation, live announcement/header editing, dirty badge, save/discard, reset, device toggle, /store rendering saved config, cart drawer (add/inc/dec/remove/subtotal), announcement dismiss, sticky pill on scroll.

issues: A11y console warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby` for DialogContent. Add DialogDescription or aria-describedby to CartDrawer's DialogContent.

action_items: (Minor) Add DialogDescription/aria-describedby to CartDrawer DialogContent to remove Radix a11y warning.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py uses `_id='site'` string and returns via `doc['config']` — correctly avoids exposing _id in response.
PUT /api/config accepts arbitrary Dict without schema validation for nested config fields — acceptable for CMS flexibility but consider stricter Pydantic model to prevent malformed writes.
No rate-limiting / auth on mutation endpoints — acceptable per user's 'no auth' choice but flag for production.
seed_data_creation: None. Reset restores defaults; tests clean up via reset fixture.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend has 3 endpoints (GET/PUT/POST reset) at /api/config*. Storefront /store uses savedConfig; builder / uses live config. Data-testids per review request all present and working. Playwright script pattern works well with force=True for clicks.
